pilot_config.pivot_threshold: IGGD n=300 < +1pp → COBA-only paper. D0c r < 0.1 → KILL DaL. All methods < vanilla at n=300 → Diagnostic study.

completed_pilots.name: Environment Setup
completed_pilots.key_result: Dream-7B + LLaDA-8B verified, 7 datasets downloaded, conda env ready

completed_pilots.name: TTT Layer Implementation
completed_pilots.key_result: Linear/MLP/Momentum variants pass 12/12 tests, loss decreases 33%

completed_pilots.name: P1: Basic Feasibility
completed_pilots.key_result: SSL loss -33% to -72%, max gradient norm 3.45, no instability

completed_pilots.name: P2: Signal Quality
completed_pilots.key_result: SNR peaks at mask ratio 0.6, critical zone [0.4-0.6], degrades at r>0.7

completed_pilots.name: P3: Quick Evaluation (DaL)
completed_pilots.key_result: Accuracy -1.0pp (79/200 vs 81/200), gate stuck at 0.007, SSL loss -52% but no task improvement

completed_pilots.name: Alternative A: Info-Gain Soft Unmasking
completed_pilots.key_result: +5pp on GSM8K-100 (39% vs 34%), p=0.182, 0.90x overhead, Distinct-2=0.892

completed_pilots.name: P4: Entropy Sparsity Analysis
completed_pilots.key_result: <13% positions contribute >80% entropy (Gini=0.85), concentrated as predicted

new_pilots.name: IGGD n=300 Verification (HIGHEST PRIORITY)
new_pilots.hypothesis_tested: H_IGGD: Info-Gain Soft achieves >=3% absolute improvement over vanilla on GSM8K-300 (p<0.05)

decision_rule.pass: IGGD is confirmed front-runner. Proceed to tau sweep + composition + full benchmarks.
decision_rule.marginal_1_3pct: Proceed cautiously. Tau sweep may find better configuration. Full benchmark needed.
decision_rule.fail_lt_1pct: IGGD is not robust. Pivot to COBA-primary paper. Diagnostic study as backup.

new_pilots.name: Vanilla Baselines (3 Primary Benchmarks)
new_pilots.hypothesis_tested: Establish reference numbers for all subsequent comparisons

pass_criteria.validity: All 3 benchmarks produce valid accuracy; GSM8K-300 ~ 34% (+/- 5%, consistent with prior)

new_pilots.name: D0c + D0d: DaL Diagnostic (DaL Fate Determination)

pass_criteria.d0c: Pearson r > 0.3 between SSL_loss_improvement and accuracy_delta across >= 10 configs

decision_rule.both_pass: PROCEED — DaL has theoretical support. Begin gate repair + 5K training.
decision_rule.d0c_marginal: r [0.1, 0.3] — Try 2 alternative SSL objectives (1 day budget). If still marginal, KILL.
decision_rule.d0c_fail: r < 0.1 — KILL DaL immediately. SSL objective structurally misaligned.
decision_rule.d0d_fail: Delta_I < 0.1 — KILL all M-axis methods. Information ceiling too low.
decision_rule.both_fail: DaL killed. Full commitment to IGGD + COBA. Diagnostic measurements are publishable.

new_pilots.name: COBA D-Axis Grid Search
new_pilots.hypothesis_tested: D-scaling curve for Dream-7B on GSM8K; saturation point identification

pass_criteria.validity: All 5 D values produce valid accuracy; non-trivial scaling structure observed

pilot_execution_order.note: Phase 0: All 4 tasks run in parallel on 4 GPUs. GPU 0: IGGD n=300, GPU 1: Baselines, GPU 2: D0c+D0d, GPU 3: COBA D-axis. Day 1.

decision_gate_phase0.iggd_confirmed: IGGD >= +3pp, p<0.05 → Front-runner confirmed. Proceed to tau sweep + composition.
decision_gate_phase0.iggd_marginal: IGGD +1-3pp or p>=0.05 → Cautious. Tau sweep to optimize. COBA becomes safety net.
decision_gate_phase0.iggd_fail: IGGD < +1pp → COBA primary paper. Diagnostic study backup.
decision_gate_phase0.d0c_d0d_pass: r>0.3 AND Delta_I>0.1 → DaL proceeds to Phase 1B (gate repair).
decision_gate_phase0.d0c_d0d_fail: r<0.1 OR Delta_I<0.1 → DaL killed. All GPUs to Track A + C.

pilot_execution_order.note: Phase 1: GPU 0-1: IGGD refinement (sequential: tau then compose). GPU 2: COBA W-axis. GPU 3: DaL gate repair (conditional). Days 2-3.

decision_gate_phase1.iggd_composition_works: Best IGGD+A-CFG > individual → Paper framed around composition study.
decision_gate_phase1.dal_phase1_pass: DaL >= vanilla + 2% on GSM8K-200 → Proceed to Phase 2B (update rules).
decision_gate_phase1.dal_phase1_fail: DaL < vanilla + 2% → DaL killed permanently. All GPUs to Track A + C.

pivot_decision_matrix.iggd_pass_dal_fail: IGGD + COBA primary paper. D0c/D0d diagnostics as secondary contribution. ~40% scenario.
pivot_decision_matrix.iggd_pass_dal_pass: Dual-track paper. IGGD + DaL + COBA. NeurIPS/ICML target. ~10% scenario.
pivot_decision_matrix.iggd_fail_coba_strong: COBA framework paper with diagnostic analysis. ICML target. ~30% scenario.
pivot_decision_matrix.all_fail: Diagnostic study: 'Why Inference-Time Scaling Remains Elusive for DLMs.' EMNLP target. ~15% scenario.
pivot_decision_matrix.iggd_pass_composition_strong: Composition study paper: 'Information-Gain Guided Decoding for DLMs.' NeurIPS target. ~40% scenario.
